introSection: Teddy Bear is a wooden kiddie roller coaster located at Stricker's Grove in Ross, Ohio, USA.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Teddy Bear was built with the blueprints of the scrapped (and identically names) Teddy Bear at the former Coney Island in Cincinnati, Ohio, USA.

fullText:
Teddy Bear is a wooden kiddie roller coaster located at Stricker's Grove in Ross, Ohio, USA.

Teddy Bear was built with the blueprints of the scrapped (and identically names) Teddy Bear at the former Coney Island in Cincinnati, Ohio, USA.
